SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.query

Class CriteriaUpdate

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.query.CriteriaUpdate
public class CriteriaUpdate extends Object
Represents a criteria-based update operation.

Provides a programmatic way to construct update queries using a criteria API, allowing dynamic and type-safe modification of entity attributes.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda
